## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. What problem does this solve?

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes existing issue without breaking changes)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking addition)
- [ ] Breaking change (breaks existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update

## Changes Made

- [ ] File 1: What changed
- [ ] File 2: What changed

## Testing

How was this tested? Describe the test coverage:

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on Windows 10/11
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] Tested on macOS

### Test Steps

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Expected outcome

## Safety & Security

- [ ] No active scanning code added (only passive)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] No new console.log statements in production code
- [ ] Privacy implications reviewed (if applicable)

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] API/IPC commands documented (if new)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guide (TypeScript/Rust)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for non-obvious logic
- [ ] No new compiler warnings generated
- [ ] Tested locally: `npm run tauri dev`
- [ ] Safety check passes: `npm run safety:no-connect`
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No merge conflicts

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Before/After UI changes

## Additional Notes

Any gotchas, performance implications, or architectural decisions?
